productDisplayName: Baggit Women Bleed Taj Teal Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 10 cm x 19 cm Crafted from leatherette with an eyelet and loop detail A buttonable flap on the front One zippered compartment with four card holders and a slip pocket on one fold and six card holders, one id holder and a slip pocket in the other Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
